chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1214 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.7207/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.7208/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 16.12.2025 Mr. Nadir Ali G. Chachar, Advocate along with applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Applicant / accused Shah Muhammad Mahar S/o Shahnawaz Khan Mahar seeks protective bail in Crime No.354/2025, registered at Police Station ‘A’ Section, Ghotki, under Section 506/1, 504, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his arrest at the hands of police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBW, if any, shall stand suspended for the period of seven days. Applicant / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of seven days or when the applicant surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
